I want to take a quiz to test my CFD knowledge.

Quiz scope: ${input:What should the quiz cover?|Module 1 - Foundations (basics, finite differences, 1D equations)|Module 2 - Core CFD (FVM, Navier-Stokes, SIMPLE, cavity flow)|Module 3 - Advanced (turbulence, mesh, higher-order, compressible)|Everything I've learned so far|A specific topic}

Difficulty: ${input:Difficulty level|Easy - conceptual questions only|Medium - mix of conceptual and numerical|Hard - include coding challenges and derivations}
